item.dc:creator: Xalten2

item.title: Funny Friday is back! A dump of things to make you laugh
item.description:
You've got to master something besides baiting before you get to that bedroom, Anakin. Funny Friday is back! It's been awhile, between not being in the mood for these posts and being busy with real life stuff, but now it's time to bring a little humor back to the end of the work week. As always, I hope you like what you see, and for the stuff that might be too scandalous for the mods, make sure you check the comments for a link to this week's bonus content.
Scooby Doo, the timeless tale of two clueless buddies, their secret lesbian friends, and their dog.
Tormund is officially a masochist! (Also, I wonder how hard she had to repress the urge to laugh while filming this)
18 would 100% pull this prank on her brother.
When you put it that way, Pearl has the patience of a saint...
Maybe Padme should have let him in that bedroom after all...
Guessing it was a Valorant game?
Let's hope they never get the infinity stones again.
I mean, that's valid...
Something very wisible...
Not sure why we're being so quick to dismiss goon, some people I know would goon all day!
If you've got that many ghosts in one house you should move regardless of whether they're angry or not. That place is cursed if that much bad shit keeps happening there.
Threw her off so much that she went straight into her midwestern voice. (Yes, mommy)
I'd indulge my inner Tolkien nerd and call it Anduril. It might not be the Flame of the West, but it works together with the flames of the west...
Lego bricks, the greatest line of defense if you're ever in a Home Alone situation...
Yeah, that would probably keep it contained
Ever get the feeling that you and your girl just aren't on the same page?
Not really funny here, this is here because it's just awesome.
Sun Tzu might have advised about how to take advantage of your enemy's weakness, but he didn't say that sometimes you'd wish you hadn't.
"The Beacons are lit! Gonador calls for aid!"
As long as you're where you want to be, you dirty little slut.
Finally found a good explanation for the old chainmail bikini armor.
The things that parents deal with from their kids...
Sometimes when you lie on your resume you're going to get caught...
This meme is without glory!
Putting your eye out is without glory, Ralphie!
... that's just not fair.
So many people would prefer the vampires... although if it's all clown girls, I won't complain too much...
Ever had something happen that ruins your favorite food for you?
"Thought you were being clever, eh chaps?" - The RAF, probably.
Every time I stay the night at my dad's house...
Lightning powers from Zeus, squirrel body... yeah, that checks out.
If Anakin thought like Spock?
I wonder if they'll cosine on a loan with me...
those passengers are in quite the pickle.
Since I don't have a cat, this is the closest thing you get to a cat tax. Hope you all have a great Friday and it's the start of a fun weekend.
item.dc:creator: PoliticalWanderer

item.title: They fired one of my fav scientists :'(
item.description: This is the guy behind many popular graphs, usually with a black background. Trump and his team of .. *checks notes* ..random rich yes men, decided to gut NOAA, which tracks hurricanes, tornadoes and the like. Don't count on being told about the next Katrina. https://bsky.app/profile/zacklabe.com

item.title: Randumbp of the day pt.1 w/sound!
item.description:
Strike!
The classic.
I have no idea.
Even if the car did an illegal lane change I hope the biker gets popped for the windshield.
With a dash of kitten.
Cheeky.
What's he sorry for, exactly? And a bonus cat tax! Never was sound on this one but it's almost ten years old and that kitty is still a hero!

item.dc:creator: pilomotor

item.title: Got my name and gender changed today
item.description: I wasn't sure if it was too late and I was so terrified, living in a red state (Utah), that I might get a judge who would deny me. Instead, I got one who was super nice, who went out of his way to congratulate and compliment a woman who was adopting her wife's biological child, and dealt with several trans people all getting our names and/or genders legally changed. The records are sealed and Utah currently allows you to change all of your documents. I am hoping to get them changed swiftly, so that all of my documents show my new name and gender, so no one will know otherwise unless we are naked together (and by that point I really hope they'd know!) Anyway, I'm so excited I cried for a half hour afterward. I can't believe I'm really here. It feels so incredibly validating.
item.dc:creator: PlanckEraWasMyBestEra

you're getting food, water, warmth and rest for free?

item.title: Mozilla quietly changed their TOS recently.
item.description: If you're running Firefox, Here is a guide to turn off some services. Just plop them in the search bar of the settings menu for quick access: https://www.privacyguides.org/en/desktop-browsers/#firefox Perhaps consider switching to LibreWolf (or Fennec on Android) which is an open-source fork of Firefox with telemetry removed. Things are only bound to get shittier and more unethical over the coming years. Remember, Firefox is only alive BECAUSE of Google funding. https://librewolf.net/installation/windows/ You can also run the arkenfox script https://github.com/arkenfox/user.js Source: https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/about/legal/terms/firefox/#you-give-mozilla-certain-rights-and-permissions Discussion: https://old.reddit.com/r/degoogle/
item.dc:creator: BlasphemousJones

item.title: Haruhi does the Geddan ゲッダン meme - YuzuPyon
item.description: Full Video + Dog Tax : https://youtu.be/8pmbuOc0EUI Hello Imgurians!!! Who remember this old meme ??? I recreated the Get Down/Geddan dance from the early 2000s in my Haruhi cosplay, peak internet days! If you are unfamiliar with the ゲッダン / Geddan / Get Down meme, it originated from a glitch found in the Nintendo 64 game GoldenEye 007 when characters would start glitching like that when you tilted the cartridge while having the game on. This was back in the 1990s. In the early 2000s, the meme spread on platforms like Nico Nico Douga, a japanese video sharing platform, where users synced the glitching game characters to the song "Promise" by 広瀬香美 / Kohmi Hirose. Other creators started recreating this irl, notably a person wearing a horse mask that got really popular at the time, so much so that it got reposted on Youtube and gained huge traction as well. This particular iteration of the meme is how I found out about it as a kid roaming the early Youtube days haha. I decided to recreate the trend in my Suzumiya Haruhi cosplay since that anime was also very popular in that same era and I believe it represents the chaotic early internet meme culture really well. I hope you enjoyed the meme history lesson! Have a nice day :) -yuzu
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1286 (ourobouros)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
I reccomend molotov cocktails.
Hell yes.
Poor Thylocene.
It's buy nothing day! So, uh, try to buy nothing today, at least nothing from a site with an algorithm--stick to local if you can.
Our Neverending cycle of horror.
They were, until they canned all of NOAA last night.
Yeah, I accidentally posted this twice, but you KNOW we are all feeling it.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "[imitation of my allergy sneezes] I love you good Pippin. " ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
